prompt:
A compact 12 V DC submersible water pump displayed on a clean hydroponics work surface, with an 8 mm outlet barb, power lead, and practical small-system scale. The object should read clearly as a standalone pump component for circulating nutrient solution, not as an installed loop or generic aquarium pump. Keep the form factor simple, functional, and unbranded.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future hydroponics aesthetic: soft bench lighting, realistic molded plastic, cable, and nozzle textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the pump centered and uncluttered so it reads instantly as a reusable hardware item.
